
version: 1.2.3
dependencies:
  http: ^1.2.0
  any_dep: any
  local:
    path: ./local
  repo:
    git:
      url: git@example.test/repo.git
  hosted_dep:
    version: 1.0.0
    hosted:
      name: hosted_alias
      url: https://pub.example.test
dev_dependencies:
  test: '2.0.0'
dependency_overrides:
  override_dep:
    version: 3.0.0
